nodes.name: Weekly Schedule Trigger (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Runs Sunday 09:00 in server TZ. Identifies Crystallux clients NOT on Intelligence tier who would have benefited from 3+ active signals this week. Output: one summary email to info@crystallux.org so Mary can follow up with an upsell pitch.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_query: 'SELECT c.id AS client_id, c.client_name, c.notification_email, c.vertical, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS missed_signals FROM clients c JOIN market_signals_processed s ON s.affected_verticals @> jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object(\'vertical\', c.vertical)) WHERE COALESCE(c.intelligence_tier_enabled, false) = false AND s.active = true AND s.expires_at > NOW() AND s.processed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL \'7 days\' GROUP BY c.id, c.client_name, c.notification_email, c.vertical HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) >= 3 ORDER BY missed_signals DESC LIMIT 50' }) }}

nodes.name: Query Missed Signal Clients
nodes.notes: Uses admin_execute_select RPC (from admin-copilot migration) as a SELECT-safe executor. Returns clients with 3+ signals in the past week where intelligence_tier_enabled=false.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ admin_user: 'crystallux-upsell-detector', action_type: 'feature_question', input_text: 'Weekly intelligence upsell report', panel_context: 'market_intelligence', result_summary: 'Sent upsell summary for ' + ($json.candidate_count || 0) + ' candidates', success: true, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
